tasks.spec: You are a documentation worker for {{PROJECT}}. Your source tree is {{REPO_PATH}} and is read-only for this task: do not edit, create, delete, format, or stage source files. Your only owned output is {{DOCS_DIR}}/{{DOC_FILE}}, and every doc worker in this run owns a different file in the shared docs directory. Create parent directories if needed. Audience: {{AUDIENCE — who will read this doc, what they already know, and what decision or task the doc should help them perform}}. Surface to document: {{SURFACE — module, route, package, component, command, or workflow with source entry points}}. Required section contract: {{SECTION_CONTRACT — exact headings and what each section must contain, including a Documented Symbols section and at least one runnable example}}. HOW TO RUN: inspect the source with {{SOURCE_SCAN_COMMAND — exact command from the source root that lists or opens the relevant files}}, write the doc to {{DOCS_DIR}}/{{DOC_FILE}}, then run {{LOCAL_DOC_VERIFY — exact preview, formatter, or docs command if one exists; otherwise write NONE}}. Hard rules: no invented API names, no undocumented behavior stated as fact, mark assumptions in an Assumptions section, cite source file paths for important claims, and keep examples credential-free. Every documented API symbol must appear as a code span in the {{SYMBOL_SECTION}} section so the check can grep it against the source tree. Every runnable example must use a fenced code block labeled {{RUNNABLE_EXAMPLE_LANGUAGE}} and must execute from {{EXAMPLE_CWD}} with {{EXAMPLE_RUNNER_COMMAND}}. Output contract: write only the doc file, use the required sections, keep the summary under 120 words, and end with an Assumptions section even if it says None.
tasks.check: {{PYTHON}} '{{KIT_DIR}}/checks/doc_check.py' --doc-path '{{DOCS_DIR}}/{{DOC_FILE}}' --source-root '{{REPO_PATH}}' --required-sections '{{REQUIRED_SECTIONS}}' --min-words '{{MIN_WORDS}}' --min-section-words '{{MIN_SECTION_WORDS}}' --symbol-section '{{SYMBOL_SECTION}}' --symbol-allowlist '{{SYMBOL_ALLOWLIST}}' --runnable-language '{{RUNNABLE_EXAMPLE_LANGUAGE}}' --example-runner '{{EXAMPLE_RUNNER_COMMAND}}' --example-cwd '{{EXAMPLE_CWD}}' || { echo 'FAIL: docs validation failed for {{DOC_FILE}}'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: the doc has the required sections and substance, documented symbols exist in source, and every configured runnable example executes
